scripts.smoke:plate-configurator: node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp-smoke', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke scripts/smokePlateConfigurator.ts && node .tmp-smoke/scripts/smokePlateConfigurator.js
scripts.check:post-codex: npm run build && npm run smoke:plate-configurator
